response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:09: Identified as intro talk/greeting. 2. 00:09-04:59: Identified song 'かくれんぼ' via on-screen lyrics and composer credits ('Eren', 'TKT'). 3. Used search tool to find the full Japanese lyrics and confirmed artist/composer metadata. 4. Generated JSON with full lyrics and scene structure.
response.global_summary: Kazama Iroha performs a full vocal version of the song "Kakurenbo" at her birthday live concert.

scenes.description: The performer greets the audience and introduces the concert.
Kazama Iroha performs 'Kakurenbo' on stage. Text displays 'Music: Eren' and 'Lyrics: TKT'.

A world connected by lines that I traced

No matter how dark it is
